title: Cross-component APIs & contracts
description: The shared seams every component depends on. Defines: spawneryapp.yml manifest schema; spawn.yml schema (data-repo source of truth, secrets excluded); container orchestration interface (start/exec/stop); ACP client<->agent orchestration contract; storage-adapter interface (materialize/persist); model-sidecar OpenAI-compatible API + central-gateway protocol + metering/audit hooks; CP index API; edge-activator session-token/auth protocol; permission/consent + egress-allowlist schema; catalog/registry index API. Design-first; all other epics consume these contracts. See design doc sections 2,3,5,6,7,8,9,10.
notes:
Design doc (v1, interview complete): docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-26-spawnery-e0-contracts-design.md — see Appendix decision log (E0.1–E0.9).
v2 corrections: CP = single central managed instance (self-host = node agents attaching to it); rendezvous relay in CP; s2s=gRPC; Apps agent-agnostic (agent chosen at spawn, manifest declares compat); skills imported via agent's native process; storage detail -> E3; personalization + permissions -> post-MVP (TODO.md). Amended system-design §1/§4/§10.

title: Runtime & orchestration core
description: Control plane, node agent, container lifecycle (ephemeral, scale-to-zero), ACP orchestration layer, pluggable isolation-backend abstraction (concrete impls deferred), scheduler/placement (local-first, audit-flag set at placement). Design doc sections 3,4.
notes: Design doc (v1): docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-27-spawnery-e1-runtime-core-design.md. Decisions: per-agent base image + mount definition (no per-(App,agent) build); cold-start every wake (warm pools post-MVP); placement = open app + owner node -> owner node else cloud; 2-D burst (CPU->offload containers, GPU->offload inference); idle/close/cap teardown, resume from /data; pod = base[agent+bridge+toolset]+sidecar; Docker/Podman backend first. Refined E0 §7/§3.

title: Launch coach repos
description: Definition repos + bundled tools for the launch lineup: zork (no storage; first vertical-slice smoke test), llm-wiki (flagship/wedge), habit/goal coach, system-design-interview coach. Design doc sections 11,12.

title: App packaging & catalog
description: spawneryapp.yml spec + validation; definition-repo format; versioning (git tags, auto-upgrade + opt-out pin + escalation/snapshot/changelog guardrails); open registry; private-App human-review pipeline; catalog index + marketplace backend. Design doc sections 2,8.

title: Web client
description: Catalog browse; spawn wizard (connect storage, pick model, personalization, consent); chat UI over the direct ACP channel; spawn management + portability (export / re-spawn from data repo). Design doc sections 8,10.

title: Model layer
description: Per-spawn model-gateway sidecar (OpenAI-compatible, LiteLLM-style); cloud central gateway (managed keys, route to local DeepSeek/burst, metering); BYO direct-to-provider; metering pipeline; audit hook point. Design doc section 6.
notes: Design doc (v1): docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-27-spawnery-e2-model-layer-design.md. Decisions: translation/routing split (sidecar=BYO direct, gateway=managed); BYO key sealed to NODE pubkey, CP-relayed opaque, node unseals+injects (CP never sees plaintext; node autogen keypair, pubkey enrolled, CP vends); managed keys central-only; local DeepSeek behind OpenAI-compat server; route local/cloud per GPU-burst; gateway meters + enforces free-tier caps; MVP managed DeepSeek + BYO OpenAI-compat.

title: Identity & secrets
description: OAuth login (Google + GitHub, GitHub doubles as storage connection); account model + creator role; server-blind vault passphrase; client-side BYO-key encryption + end-to-end delivery to the sidecar. Design doc section 7.

title: Storage layer
description: Uniform /data git-working-tree mount; provider-adapter framework; GitHub App adapter (fine-grained per-repo); blob adapter (git bundle); single-writer/conflict handling; spawn.yml read/write; optional conversation-history persistence. Design doc sections 2,5.

title: Trust, safety & audit
description: Permission/consent enforcement; egress allowlist enforcement; audit pipeline (sidecar conversation-content logging for Spawnery-operated cloud only); abuse signals; flagging/takedown for the open registry. Design doc section 9.

title: Cloud burst
description: DEFERRED (post-MVP). Autoscaler/provisioner; cloud node agents; burst inference + container routing; capacity signaling from the home machine. Design doc sections 4,12 (sub-project 9).

title: Billing, payments & rev-share
description: DEFERRED (post-MVP). Metering->billing; subscription tiers; BYOK tier; premium-models / private-apps gating; creator payouts and marketplace rev-share. Design doc sections 12,13 (sub-project 10).
